scripts.docker:dev:redeploy: npm run docker:dev:stop && npm run docker:dev
scripts.docker:prod: export $(grep -v '^#' .env.production | xargs) && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build
scripts.docker:prod:redeploy: npm run docker:prod:stop && npm run docker:prod
scripts.docker:prod:clean: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml down && export $(grep -v '^#' .env.production | xargs) && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build
scripts.docker:volumes:prune:unused: sh -c 'for name in shuttlementor-app-dev shuttlementor-db-dev shuttlementor-app-prod shuttlementor-db-prod; do docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" | grep -qx "$name" || { echo "Refusing to prune volumes: expected running container $name"; exit 1; }; done; volumes=$( { docker volume ls -q --filter dangling=true --filter label=com.docker.compose.project=shuttlementor-dev; docker volume ls -q --filter dangling=true --filter label=com.docker.compose.project=shuttlementor-prod; } | sort -u ); if [ -z "$volumes" ]; then echo "No unused ShuttleMentor volumes to prune"; exit 0; fi; printf "%s\n" "$volumes" | xargs docker volume rm'
scripts.docker:db:migrate:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec app npm run db:migrate
scripts.docker:db:migrate:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec app npm run db:migrate
scripts.docker:db:studio:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec app npx prisma studio --port 5555
scripts.docker:db:studio:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec app npx prisma studio --port 5556
